---
name: "🤖 Agent verification report"
about: "Ran /clone-app with an agent? Tell us how it went so the compatibility table stays honest."
title: "[agent report] <agent>: <app you cloned>"
labels: ["agent-report"]
---

Thanks for running it. This is the single most useful issue you can open, and it
needs no setup beyond what you already did.

**Which agent?**
<!-- Claude Code / Cursor / Codex CLI / Windsurf / Gemini CLI / Copilot / Cline / Roo / Continue / OpenCode / Amazon Q / Augment / Aider / other -->

**What did you clone?**
<!-- app name + roughly how many screenshots -->

**Did `/clone-app` run end to end?**
<!-- yes / partly (where did it stop?) / no -->

**Did `npm run verify` pass?**
<!-- yes / no / did not run -->

**What came out great, and what came out wrong?**

**Anything the skill should handle better?**

<!-- Screenshots of the result are very welcome. -->
